news.title: Zollkontrollen in Köln und der Region: Schwarzarbeit im Visier: Zoll prüft Gastro und Konzertpersonal - Rheinische Anzeigenblätter
news.summary:
# Summary

German customs authorities conducted inspections across Cologne and the surrounding region, targeting restaurants and concert venues to investigate illegal employment practices. The raids focused on identifying undeclared workers ("Schwarzarbeit") in the hospitality and event sectors. Visitors to Cologne should be aware that restaurants and venues may experience disruptions, and the enforcement actions highlight potential labor practice issues in the local food service industry.

This new venture continues the mentorship and social responsibility approach they learned from Nobels' kitchen. Visitors to the city should care because it represents a quality dining option run by experienced chefs with a meaningful social impact on the local community.

news.title: Na negen jaar voor de klas opent Charlotte (33) nu haar eigen bar op het Zuid: “Geen tapas, wel verfijnde bordjes met lekkere wijnen en aperitiefjes” - HLN
news.summary:
# Summary

Charlotte, a 33-year-old former teacher, has opened her own bar in the Zuid neighborhood after nine years in the classroom. The bar specializes in refined small plates paired with quality wines and aperitifs rather than traditional tapas. Visitors to the area will appreciate a new upscale spot for sophisticated drinks and charcuterie-style dining in a neighborhood known for dining and nightlife.
